name: mouse_trajectory
description: Mouse cursor positions during the SOS activity; one sample per pointer move, crash-flushed NDJSON, gzipped after the recording closed.

channels.name: t
channels.description: Sample time in seconds on the declared clock.

channels.name: x
channels.description: Cursor X, pixels from the left screen edge.

channels.name: y
channels.description: Cursor Y, pixels from the top screen edge.
